Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This must the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Excuse me, {f 4 2}-san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. No problems to report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 202 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This must the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Excuse me, {f 4 2}-san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. No problems to report.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_305_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}There appears to be less damage from pests than the data in my predictions suggests.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}We haven't taken any specific measures against them. What is the cause of this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_307_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! I've sighted a ladybug larva! It's very small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_311_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This must the reason why they've been growing so well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_313_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Agreed. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}That would explain why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_318_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You don't look so well. You don't have to worry about it biting you though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I will move it to another leaf then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_318_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_323_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_324_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}My apologies, I got distracted. Let's keep working.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_326_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_328_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Excuse me, {f 4 2}-san. Please apply the repellant on that end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_329_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_330_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}That concludes our mission for today. We should head back now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_332_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}There isn't as much damage from pests as I was expecting. That's a relief.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 21 7 4}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}But we haven't taken any special measures. What's going on...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_335_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Look, {f 4 2}-san! There's a ladybug larva! It's so small and adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_339_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_342_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Yes. We wouldn't want to interrupt it while it's eating.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Ladybugs are the natural predators of pests that damage plants...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}That explains why there weren't any harmful insects around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}{f 4 21 7 7}Thank you very much, little ladybug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_346_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}I'm sorry. Are you uncomfortable with insects? I'll move it to another leaf.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_346_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It looks like the ladybug would prefer to be near you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_351_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Even in just these tiny planters, there is so much life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}There's no one to teach them. They're just doing the best they can...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_352_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Sorry, I got distracted. Shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_354_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_356_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 3 25 25}It may be rude to interfere, but we can't let them ruin our harvest.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 1 25 25}Let's give the ladybug some assistance this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_357_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to the care we put in, it looks[n]like the plants will grow nicely...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_358_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 5 13 22 1 7}Status reads all green. I don't see any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}That should be enough for today. Let's head back now.[n]{f 1 1}
